instruction: use pitcher to pour water into tall glass and wine glass

segments.subtask: twist open the pitcher lid
pick up the pitcher
pour water from the pitcher into the wine glass
place the pitcher on the black board right next to wine glass
twist the pitcher lid to close it
pick up the pitcher
pour water from the pitcher into the wine glass
move the tall glass closer to the wine glass
place the pitcher on the black board right and below the wine glass
twist the pitcher lid to open it slightly
pick up the pitcher
pour a bit of water from the pitcher into the tall glass
move the glass wine 7cm to the left
pour water from the pitcher into the tall glass until it's almost full
pour water from the pitcher into the wine glass until it's full
pour water from the pitcher into the tall glass until it's full
place the pitcher on the table
reposition the wine glass to the left center part of table
move the tall glass to the right-center part of the table
place the pitcher on the center part of the table between the two glasses
